mentions.note: Worst S&P performer of 2025, down about 68%, as programmatic ad-tech loses ground to deep-pocketed competitors like Amazon; still needs to prove it can adapt to AI.

Advertising-tech chronic underperformer; down 68% in 2026, down another 20% YTD; CFO fired after 5 months (major red flag); valuation collapsed from 62x to 15x but confidence lacking until turnaround evident.

Chronic underperformer; down 68% in 2026 YTD already worst performer on S&P 500 last year; CFO fired after only 5 months major red flag; struggling to adapt to AI era; Wall Street fears ad-tech middlemen obsolete as Meta handles own AI targeting; down another 17% this week; now 15x forward earnings vs. 62x last year.
Fired new CFO after just 5 months; CFO uncertainty combined with AI displacement concerns make risk/reward unfavorable.
Sixth-worst S&P performer in January; CFO departure after 5 months on job plus AI disruption making platform irrelevant; not worth the risk.
$150M insider buying; 22% growth; faces Amazon competition; Cramer willing to 'bless' at $22 entry; needs couple quarters of proof.
